title: Springy Roasted Portuguese Samphire Roast
description: A cozy Portuguese dish featuring roasted samphire, perfect for a spring evening, and is dairy-free friendly. This recipe uses sous-vide for tender results.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
Rinse the samphire and cut it into 2 inch pieces.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, lemon juice, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the samphire to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Transfer the samphire to a sous-vide bag and seal, then cook at 180 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
While the samphire is cooking, toss the potatoes with a little olive oil, salt, and pepper on a baking sheet.
Roast the potatoes in the oven for 20 minutes, or until they are tender and lightly browned.
Remove the samphire from the sous-vide bag and add it to the baking sheet with the potatoes.
Roast the samphire and potatoes together for an additional 10 minutes, or until the samphire is tender and lightly browned.
Serve the samphire and potatoes hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
